name: File Download via IMEWDBLD
description: Detects network connections initiated by `IMEWDBLD.exe`. While this executable has legitimate functions related to Microsoft IME, unexpected network activity can indicate suspicious behavior, possibly related to file downloads or other network-based actions by malware.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network connection event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Network Connection (3).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process making the network connection, which should be 'IMEWDBLD.exe'.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the connection.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port of the connection.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the connection.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the connection.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which IMEWDBLD.exe was running.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
